nodes.name: RSS Feed List
nodes.notes: Updated 2026-03-10: 22 feeds across AI, security, dev tools, creative, markets, prediction markets (Quotient, Harry Crane, Terry's Takes). YouTube channels removed pending subscription sync.

parameters.jsCode:
const urls = $input.first().json.feedUrls.split('\n').filter(u => u.trim());
return urls.map(url => ({ json: { feedUrl: url.trim() } }));
